title: Tinker's Construct Addon: Tool Leveling with Random Modifiers
description: Old fashioned tinkers tool leveling where your tool gains a random modifier on levelup. Extremely configurable.
body:
[This is a fork of Liketechnik-s-Tinker-Tweaks, which is itself a fork of Tinker Tool Leveling.]

 

Adds random modifiers to your tool when it levels up, with chat messages telling you which modifier you got, and incorporates some features from other Tinker Tool leveling mods.

 

Current Feature list:

* Gain a random modifier on levelup ('bonusRandomModifier' in the config; default: on)
* Gain a modifier slot on levelup ('bonusModifierSlot' in the config; default: off)
* Gain base stats on levelup ('bonusStats' in the config; default: off)
* Customize how much the XP requirement scales per level (default: doubles each level)
* Customize XP requirement on a per-tool-type basis
* Customize random modifer pool on a per-tool-type basis (supports modifiers added by other mods) in the config
* Customize number of free modifier slots for a freshly made tool in the config
* Customize which stats grow and by how much, if the growth module is enabled in the config (bow stats and harvest level not yet supported)
* Customize the chat messages associated with each level-up and modifier in the config (supports standard Minecraft color codes)
 

Planned features:
* Construct's Armory support
* More in depth stat growth options

Links:
